events.title: Resonanz — Contact to Ecstatic Dance
events.description: A dedicated Thursday evening series at Paradiso Ubud weaving contact improvisation, ecstatic dance, and sound. The evening opens at 18:00 with an open contact jam — floor is fluid, connection-led. At 19:00 the ecstatic dance set begins with a live DJ arc, building through peaks and softening into a Sonic Savasana close at 20:30. Capped at 50 people for an intimate floor. A sister event to Vibración and Dance Temple that share Paradiso's Thursday calendar — each holds its own format and slug.
events.short_description: Thursday at Paradiso: contact jam 18:00 → DJ-led ecstatic dance 19:00 → Sonic Savasana 20:30. Capped at 50.

events.title: FLUID — Contact Improvisation with Sima
events.description: A dedicated Sunday evening contact improvisation session at The Yoga Barn, led by Sima. Running 18:30–20:00, FLUID offers a structured-but-open floor for practitioners of all levels to explore touch, weight-sharing, and spontaneous movement conversation. Distinct from the Sunday afternoon Ecstatic Dance — FLUID stays fully within the contact-improv idiom without transitioning to ecstatic dance.
events.short_description: Weekly Sunday contact improvisation at Yoga Barn with Sima. 18:30–20:00, all levels welcome.

events.title: Sound Medicine with Shervin Boloorian
events.description: A weekly Wednesday evening sound healing session at The Yoga Barn, facilitated by Shervin Boloorian — Asia's first certified Tama-Do sound therapist and a BaliSpirit Festival presenter. Running 19:30–21:00, the session uses over 60 acoustic instruments including Tibetan singing bowls, gongs, tuning forks, koshi chimes, and voice to create a full-spectrum sound immersion. Described as Ubud's longest-running dedicated sound-medicine event. Book directly at the Yoga Barn front desk or via soundhealingbali.com — no Megatix pre-sale.
events.short_description: Weekly Wednesday sound medicine with Asia's first Tama-Do certified therapist — 60+ instruments. 19:30–21:00 at Yoga Barn.

events.title: New Moon Cacao & Sound Journey
events.description: A new moon ceremony at The Yoga Barn on Friday July 24 combining ceremonial cacao with a live sound journey. Timed to the dark-moon window ahead of the July 25 new moon (WITA), this one-off evening weaves cacao ritual, guided intention-setting, and an immersive sound bath. Part of Yoga Barn's monthly moon-ceremony calendar, alongside the lunar ecstatic dance events.
events.short_description: New moon cacao ceremony + sound journey at Yoga Barn, Fri Jul 24 — dark-moon timing, one-off evening.

events.title: Kirtan & Cacao with Diana Beauty & Friends
events.description: A ticketed Sunday evening bhakti kirtan series at Sayuri Healing Food in Peliatan, led by Diana Beauty — a Singapore-born bhakti singer and yoga teacher (Hatha + aerial) based in Bali since 2020. The format is call-and-response Sanskrit mantra chanting with live accompaniment ('& Friends'), opened with a cacao ceremony to deepen arrival. Runs 18:00–20:00. Distinct from Vasudev's long-running Sunday Bhakti Kirtan at the same venue (donation-based, walk-in) — Diana's series is separately ticketed with its own Megatix slug, different facilitator, different vibe.
events.short_description: Sunday bhakti kirtan + cacao at Sayuri Healing Food, 18:00–20:00. Led by Diana Beauty. IDR 150k presale / 200k door.
events.venue_address: Jl. Sukma Kesuma No. 2, Peliatan, Ubud
